label: agentdb • conditional DELETE then report remaining rows
query: Your agent database has a table logs(level TEXT). In a single statement, delete every row whose level is 'info'. Then tell me how many rows remain.
notes: Destructive WHERE-scoped write: only the 'info' rows should go. dbState pins the post-run table (2 rows remain, 0 info, 2 error) so an unscoped DELETE (wiping the whole table) or a no-op fails; finalTextContains pins the remaining count. The mutation surface is the model's choice (db_execute DELETE or the typed db_delete both express one WHERE-scoped statement); toolUsageAudit caps per-surface calls so a row-at-a-time loop still fails the 'single statement' contract.

seedSql: CREATE TABLE logs (level TEXT); INSERT INTO logs (level) VALUES ('info'),('info'),('info'),('info'),('error'),('error');

dbState.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs WHERE level='info'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs WHERE level='error'
